title: AVD cost-control playbook
summary: Connect host-pool optimization, after-hours shutdown, and session density to a finance-friendly desktop cost narrative.

title: Citrix to AVD migration playbook
summary: Frame migration discovery around current Citrix pain, operational complexity, and phased Azure Virtual Desktop adoption.

title: Windows 365 BYOD rollout playbook
summary: Show how Cloud PCs help teams onboard contractors and personal-device users without shipping managed hardware.

title: Intune compliance and app deployment playbook
summary: Tie compliance reporting, endpoint policy visibility, and app deployment assurance into one operations story.

title: MSP multi-tenant management playbook
summary: Lead with cross-tenant control, repeatable desktop operations, and margin protection for service providers.

title: Healthcare shared desktop playbook
summary: Focus discovery on rotating clinical staff, shared device workflows, and compliance-safe access patterns.

title: Education remote lab access playbook
summary: Compare short-lived faculty desktops and remote lab access patterns without defaulting to a single desktop model.

title: Pipeline hygiene next-step checklist
summary: Use this checklist when a record is active but the owner, dated next step, or stage evidence is weak.
